text: Stephen Miller: President Trump has put Iran in a box. He has played the checkmate move. No matter what path Iran chooses, America wins.
text_zh: 斯蒂芬·米勒：特朗普总统已经把伊朗逼入绝境。他已经走出了将死的一步棋。无论伊朗选择哪条路，美国都赢了。

text: Stephen Miller: What you are watching now in Iran with the implementation of this blockade is the total resetting of the American power dynamic. For the next 100 years.
text_zh: 斯蒂芬·米勒：你现在在伊朗看到的这种封锁的实施，是对美国权力动态的彻底重置。未来100年都是如此。

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding near Nahariya, Acre, and other surrounding areas in Northern Israel: • Confrontation Line • Upper Galilee @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部纳哈里亚、阿卡及周边地区响起红色警报：• 对峙线 • 上加利利 @wfwitness

text: U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent: We are partnering with our Gulf allies. They are much more willing to share the bank accounts of members of the Iranian regime. We are reaching out to banks, including Chinese banks. Any Iranian goods purchases are forbidden. We will press for secondary sanctions if there’s a problem.
text_zh: 美国财政部长斯科特·贝森特：我们正在与海湾盟友合作。他们非常愿意分享伊朗政权成员的银行账户。我们正在接触包括中国银行在内的各家银行。任何伊朗商品的采购都是被禁止的。如果出现问题，我们将推动二级制裁。

text: OSINTtechnical Iran used a Chinese satellite to gather intelligence it used to target numerous sites across the Middle East -FT TEE-01B, a visual imaging satellite launched in 2024, saw use gathering imagery of Prince Sultan Air Base just hours before and after a missile attack on 3/14. https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2044283073806606480/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical：伊朗利用一颗中国卫星收集情报，用于瞄准中东各地的多个地点——FT TEE-01B是一颗2024年发射的视觉成像卫星，在3月14日导弹袭击前后的几个小时内，被用于收集苏丹亲王空军基地的图像。https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2044283073806606480/photo/1 推文

text: U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent on climate change: The natural habitat for the earth is actually water. The climate does change. We are going through cycles.
text_zh: 美国财政部长斯科特·贝森特谈气候变化：地球的自然栖息地实际上是水。气候确实在变化。我们正在经历周期。

text: JD Vance on Epstein: What you see in those emails is that Jeffrey Epstein hated Donald Trump, and Donald Trump hated Jeffrey Epstein.
text_zh: JD·万斯谈爱泼斯坦：你在那些电子邮件中看到的是，杰弗里·爱泼斯坦讨厌唐纳德·特朗普，而唐纳德·特朗普讨厌杰弗里·爱泼斯坦。

text: 🇺🇸 💬 JD Vance on Epstein: If you look at the emails, it’s obvious that Jeffrey Epstein hated Donald J. Trump. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 💬 JD·万斯谈爱泼斯坦：如果你看看那些电子邮件，很明显杰弗里·爱泼斯坦讨厌唐纳德·J·特朗普。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇸 💬 JD Vance explains what Trump means when he says the Epstein thing is a hoax 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 💬 JD·万斯解释特朗普所说的“爱泼斯坦事件是一场骗局”是什么意思 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇨🇳 FT: Iran’s IRGC Aerospace Force secretly acquired a Chinese-built spy satellite, the TEE-01B, in late 2024, reportedly gaining new surveillance capability over U.S. military sites in the Middle East. The satellite was used to monitor bases including Prince Sultan Air Base in Saudi Arabia, Muwaffaq Salti Air Base in Jordan, and areas near U.S. facilities in Bahrain and Iraq during recent regional tensions. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇨🇳 金融时报：伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队航空航天部队在2024年底秘密获得了一颗中国制造的间谍卫星TEE-01B，据报道获得了对美国中东军事基地的新监视能力。该卫星在最近的地区紧张局势中被用于监视包括沙特阿拉伯苏丹亲王空军基地、约旦穆瓦法克·萨尔蒂空军基地以及巴林和伊拉克美军设施周边地区。@wfwitness

text: JD Vance on Epstein: If you look at the emails, it’s obvious that Jeffrey Epstein hated Donald J. Trump. The fact that Jeffrey Epstein hates Donald J. Trump is a pretty good thing for Donald J. Trump.
text_zh: JD·万斯谈爱泼斯坦：如果你看看那些电子邮件，很明显杰弗里·爱泼斯坦讨厌唐纳德·J·特朗普。杰弗里·爱泼斯坦讨厌唐纳德·J·特朗普这一事实对唐纳德·J·特朗普来说是件好事。

text: U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent: A Chinese EV is a coal-powered vehicle.
text_zh: 美国财政部长斯科特·贝森特：中国电动汽车是燃煤驱动的车辆。

text: JD Vance on Epstein: When Trump says this is a hoax, he’s not saying it’s a hoax that Epstein was a scumbag or connected to powerful people—he’s saying the Democratic idea that he was Epstein’s best friend is a hoax.
text_zh: JD·万斯谈爱泼斯坦：当特朗普说这是一个骗局时，他并不是说爱泼斯坦是个混蛋或与权贵有联系是骗局——他是说民主党人认为他是爱泼斯坦最好的朋友这一说法是骗局。

text: 🇺🇸 💬 🇺🇦 JD Vance: Stopping funding the Ukraine war is one of the things I’m proudest of we’ve done in this administration. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 💬 🇺🇦 JD·万斯：停止资助乌克兰战争是我在这届政府中所做的最让我自豪的事情之一。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: JD Vance: Stopping funding the Ukraine war is one of the things I’m proudest of we’ve done in this administration.
text_zh: JD·万斯：停止资助乌克兰战争是我在这届政府中所做的最让我自豪的事情之一。

text: 🇺🇸 In case you ever wonder what is Biden up to - he's being his usual self. For example, he was really excited to find a guy who looks like Obama 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 如果你好奇拜登在做什么——他还是老样子。例如，他非常兴奋地找到了一个长得像奥巴马的人 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Russia's Lavrov says Russia can “without a doubt, compensate” China’s resource shortfall from the Iran war.
text_zh: 俄罗斯拉夫罗夫表示，俄罗斯可以“毫无疑问地补偿”中国因伊朗战争而产生的资源缺口。

text: Maria Bartiromo: Is the Iran war over? Trump: I think it’s close to over. Yeah. I mean I view it as very close to over.
text_zh: 玛丽亚·巴蒂罗莫：伊朗战争结束了吗？特朗普：我认为快结束了。是的。我的意思是，我认为它非常接近结束了。

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 Russian Security Council: “The US and Israel may use negotiations to prepare a ground operation in Iran, as the Pentagon continues to build up troop deployments in the region”
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 俄罗斯安全会议：“美国和以色列可能会利用谈判来准备对伊朗的地面行动，因为五角大楼继续在该地区增加部队部署”

text: Trump to ABC News: If I weren’t president, the world would be torn to pieces.
text_zh: 特朗普对美国广播公司新闻部说：如果我不是总统，世界就会四分五裂。

text: Trump says he doesn’t plan to extend the ceasefire with Iran, calling it unnecessary, and hinted at “an amazing two days ahead.” Source: ABC News
text_zh: 特朗普表示他不打算延长与伊朗的停火协议，称其没有必要，并暗示“未来两天将会有惊人的事情发生”。来源：美国广播公司新闻部

text: 🇷🇺 💬 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 The US and Israel may use negotiations to prepare a ground operation in Iran, as the Pentagon continues to build up troop deployments in the region — Russian Security Council 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 💬 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国和以色列可能会利用谈判来准备对伊朗的地面行动，因为五角大楼继续在该地区增加部队部署 —— 俄罗斯安全会议 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Trump, randomly: NATO wasn’t there for us, and they won’t be there for us in the future!
text_zh: 特朗普随口说道：北约没有支持我们，未来也不会支持我们！

text: Trump: Will someone please tell Pope Leo that Iran has killed at least 42,000 innocent, completely unarmed, protesters in the last two months, and that for Iran to have a Nuclear Bomb is absolutely unacceptable. Thank you for your attention to this matter.
text_zh: 特朗普：请谁去告诉教皇利奥，伊朗在过去两个月里杀害了至少42,000名无辜、完全手无寸铁的抗议者，而且伊朗拥有核弹是绝对不可接受的。感谢您对此事的关注。

text: 🇺🇸 💬 🇨🇳 🇮🇷 US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent says China will be cut off from Iranian oil: Those ships aren’t going to be allowed out anymore… they’re not going to be able to get their oil. They can get oil. Not Iranian oil. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 💬 🇨🇳 🇮🇷 美国财政部长斯科特·贝森特表示，中国将被切断伊朗石油供应：那些船只将不再被允许离开……他们将无法获得石油。他们可以获得石油。但不是伊朗石油。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in Kiryat Shmona, and the surrounding areas of the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部基里亚特什莫纳及对峙线周边地区响起红色警报。@wfwitness

text: Will someone please tell Donnie to stop treating Truth Social like it’s the Oval Office?
text_zh: 有人能告诉唐尼别再把“真实社交”当成椭圆形办公室了吗？

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇵🇪 AP: Peru’s election is facing major voting disruptions after authorities failed to deliver ballots and election materials to multiple polling stations on time, delaying the opening of voting centers across the country and abroad. The issues left thousands…" ⚡️ 🇵🇪 Right-wing candidate Rafael López Aliaga alleged fraud in Peru’s presidential election and gave the head of Peru’s electoral court a 24-hour ultimatum to annul the results, warning he would call for a “civil insurgency” if not complied with, saying “we give you 24 hours to declare this garbage null.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇵🇪 美联社：秘鲁选举面临重大投票中断，当局未能按时将选票和选举材料送达多个投票站，导致全国及海外投票中心开放延迟。这些问题导致数千人……” ⚡️ 🇵🇪 右翼候选人拉斐尔·洛佩斯·阿里亚加指控秘鲁总统选举存在舞弊，并给秘鲁选举法院院长下了24小时最后通牒，要求废除选举结果，警告如果不遵守，他将呼吁进行“公民叛乱”，称“我们给你24小时宣布这些垃圾无效。” @wfwitness

text: 🇷🇺 🇨🇳 ⚡️ Lavrov: Russia & China Reject Western Hegemony Rooted in Colonialism "Blatant attempts by the West, both the United States and Europe, to maintain and even upgrade its hegemony… including the slave trade, colonialism… continue living… at the expense of others" He warned West Asia and the Persian Gulf is “a crisis knot” that cannot be easily cut. — @SputnikInt
text_zh: 🇷🇺 🇨🇳 ⚡️ 拉夫罗夫：俄罗斯和中国拒绝根植于殖民主义的西方霸权。“西方，无论是美国还是欧洲，维持甚至升级其霸权的公然企图……包括奴隶贸易、殖民主义……继续以牺牲他人为代价生活……” 他警告说，西亚和波斯湾是“一个危机结”，不容易解开。 — @SputnikInt

text: OSINTdefender Iran secretly used a ‌Chinese spy satellite during the recent war that gave its military new capability to target U.S. military bases across the ‌Middle ⁠East, sources tell the ⁠Financial Times. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2044271133571092959/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender：消息人士告诉《金融时报》，伊朗在最近的战争中秘密使用了一颗中国间谍卫星，使其军队获得了瞄准中东各地美军基地的新能力。https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2044271133571092959/photo/1 推文

text: The Spectator Index Trump says that NATO 'was not there for us' and won't be in the future. https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/2044266327523897826/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index：特朗普表示北约“没有支持我们”，未来也不会。https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/2044266327523897826/photo/1 推文

text: U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent says China will effectively be cut off from Iranian oil: Those ships aren’t going to be allowed out anymore… they’re not going to be able to get their oil. They can get oil. Not Iranian oil.
text_zh: 美国财政部长斯科特·贝森特表示，中国实际上将被切断伊朗石油供应：那些船只将不再被允许离开……他们将无法获得石油。他们可以获得石油。但不是伊朗石油。

text: Ukraine’s Military Intelligence(GUR) says it secretly carried out two rocket launches to near-space/space during the war—one above 100 km (crossing into space) and another reaching 204 km. They also tested a rocket launched from an aircraft at ~8,000 m, which they say is Europe’s first air-launch of its kind. This approach could eventually enable an “airborne launch system” for missiles or even small satellites. Source: Defence Blog
text_zh: 乌克兰军事情报局（GUR）表示，它在战争期间秘密进行了两次近太空/太空火箭发射——一次超过100公里（进入太空），另一次达到204公里。他们还测试了一种从飞机上发射的火箭，高度约为8,000米，他们称这是欧洲首次此类空中发射。这种方法最终可能实现导弹甚至小型卫星的“机载发射系统”。来源：国防博客

text: 🇷🇺 🇨🇳 ⚡️ “The international situation… is now being aggravated by the actions of our Western colleagues in regions including Ukraine, Latin America and the Strait of Hormuz " — Lavrov — @SputnikInt
text_zh: 🇷🇺 🇨🇳 ⚡️ “国际局势……目前正因我们西方同事在乌克兰、拉丁美洲和霍尔木兹海峡等地区的行动而加剧” — 拉夫罗夫 — @SputnikInt

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇨🇳 Reuters: A Chinese tanker sanctioned by the United States has passed through the Strait of Hormuz despite the U.S. blockade, according to shipping data. The vessel, identified as Rich Starry, is reported to have carried around 250,000 barrels of methanol…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇨🇳 Reuters: The U.S.-sanctioned Chinese tanker Rich Starry returned to the Strait of Hormuz on Wednesday after briefly exiting the Gulf, failing to break the U.S. blockade. It had been one of at least eight ships crossing the waterway on the first day of the blockade. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇨🇳 路透社：航运数据显示，一艘被美国制裁的中国油轮尽管受到美国封锁，仍通过了霍尔木兹海峡。该船被确认为Rich Starry号，据报道载有约25万桶甲醇……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇨🇳 路透社：被美国制裁的中国油轮Rich Starry号在短暂离开海湾后，于周三返回霍尔木兹海峡，未能打破美国封锁。它是封锁第一天穿过该水道的至少八艘船只之一。@wfwitness

text: Iran secretly acquired a Chinese-built spy satellite (TEE-01B) in late 2024 via the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps aerospace unit. Leaked documents suggest the satellite was then used to monitor key U.S. military bases across the Middle East, producing time-stamped imagery and coordinates. These were used before and after drone and missile strikes to help plan attacks and assess damage. Source: FT
text_zh: 伊朗在2024年底通过伊斯兰革命卫队航空航天部队秘密获得了一颗中国制造的间谍卫星（TEE-01B）。泄露的文件显示，该卫星随后被用于监视中东各地的关键美军基地，生成了带时间戳的图像和坐标。这些信息在无人机和导弹袭击前后被用于帮助规划攻击和评估损失。来源：金融时报

text: 🇷🇺 💬 Russia can make up for the energy resource deficit of China and other interested countries, which arose against the backdrop of the blockade of the Strait of Hormuz, Lavrov said during his visit to China. Other statements by the head of the Russian Foreign Ministry: ➡️ Putin's visit to China will take place in the first half of 2026. ➡️ Lavrov reported that he discussed the aggravation of the situation in the world due to the actions of the West, the situation in the Middle East, the militarization of the EU, and the crisis in NATO. ➡️ The US and Iran should promote realistic goals in the negotiations, and Russia and China are ready to promote any formats of their external support. ➡️ Moscow will accept any decision by Iran on enriched uranium and is ready to play a role in resolving this issue. ➡️ Relations between Russia and the US are not at a "freezing point", contacts are being conducted, but not all of them are being reported on. ➡️ At the negotiations on Ukraine in Alaska, the discussion focused on recognizing the de jure realities on the ground, and Moscow remains committed to the agreements reached at the summit. ➡️ US sanctions against Russia remain in place, as does the discrimination of Russian energy companies in the market. ➡️ The West is plotting a new military bloc, in which Ukraine is a leading participant. ➡️ Macron is reveling in the idea of creating "stabilization forces" in Ukraine. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 💬 拉夫罗夫在访问中国期间表示，俄罗斯可以弥补中国和其他感兴趣国家因霍尔木兹海峡封锁而产生的能源资源缺口。俄罗斯外交部长的其他声明：➡️ 普京将于2026年上半年访问中国。➡️ 拉夫罗夫报告称，他讨论了因西方行动而导致的世界局势恶化、中东局势、欧盟军事化以及北约危机。➡️ 美国和伊朗应在谈判中推动现实目标，俄罗斯和中国准备推动任何形式的外部支持。➡️ 莫斯科将接受伊朗关于浓缩铀的任何决定，并准备在解决这一问题上发挥作用。➡️ 俄美关系并未处于“冰点”，双方正在进行接触，但并非所有接触都被报道。➡️ 在阿拉斯加举行的乌克兰问题谈判中，讨论重点是承认实地的法律现实，莫斯科仍然致力于峰会上达成的协议。➡️ 美国对俄罗斯的制裁仍然有效，对俄罗斯能源公司在市场上的歧视也是如此。➡️ 西方正在策划一个新的军事集团，乌克兰是其中的主要参与者。➡️ 马克龙沉迷于在乌克兰建立“稳定部队”的想法。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇵🇪 Peru voted in its 2026 general election following a turbulent period that saw seven presidents in nine years. A total of 34 candidates are competing in a crowded first round where the top two advance to a June runoff. The main contenders include: Right…" ⚡️ 🇵🇪 AP: Peru’s election is facing major voting disruptions after authorities failed to deliver ballots and election materials to multiple polling stations on time, delaying the opening of voting centers across the country and abroad. The issues left thousands of voters unable to cast ballots as scheduled, forcing officials to extend voting into an additional day in affected areas. Election observers said the problems were logistical in nature, with an EU mission stating there was no sufficient evidence to support claims of fraud, despite criticism from some candidates, namely López Aliaga. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇵🇪 秘鲁在经历了九年七位总统的动荡时期后，举行了2026年大选。共有34名候选人在拥挤的第一轮选举中竞争，前两名进入6月的决选。主要竞争者包括：右翼……” ⚡️ 🇵🇪 美联社：秘鲁选举面临重大投票中断，当局未能按时将选票和选举材料送达多个投票站，导致全国及海外投票中心开放延迟。这些问题导致数千名选民无法按计划投票，迫使官员在受影响地区将投票延长至额外的一天。选举观察员表示，这些问题属于后勤性质，欧盟代表团表示，尽管受到一些候选人（即洛佩斯·阿里亚加）的批评，但没有足够的证据支持舞弊指控。@wfwitness

text: 🇷🇺 🇨🇳 ⚡️ Lavrov holds talks with Xi Jinping during Beijing visit Lavrov and Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi discussed the US-Iran conflict, the situation in the Asia-Pacific, and the Ukraine crisis. — @SputnikInt
text_zh: 🇷🇺 🇨🇳 ⚡️ 拉夫罗夫在北京访问期间与习近平举行会谈。拉夫罗夫与中国外交部长王毅讨论了美伊冲突、亚太局势和乌克兰危机。 — @SputnikInt

text: 🇺🇸 Trump posts a message for NATO and for the Pope 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 特朗普为北约和教皇发布了一条信息 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ Trump and his Anti-NATO Meltdown -- AGAIN
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 特朗普和他的反北约崩溃——再次发生

text: OSINTdefender Since its founding, the only time that NATO has ever invoked Article 5 has been in the defense of the United States after 9/11, leading to the death of several hundred NATO-led coalition troops during the War in Afghanistan. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2044263762421596523/photo/1 U.S. President Donald J. Trump continues his complaining about NATO in a late night post on TruthSocial, stating: “NATO wasn’t there for us, and they won’t be there for us in the future! President DONALD J. TRUMP” https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2044261385282920941/photo/1 - OSINTdefender tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender：自成立以来，北约唯一一次援引第五条款是在9/11事件后为了保卫美国，这导致了阿富汗战争期间数百名北约领导的联军士兵死亡。https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2044263762421596523/photo/1 美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普继续在“真实社交”深夜发帖抱怨北约，称：“北约没有支持我们，未来也不会支持我们！唐纳德·J·特朗普总统” https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2044261385282920941/photo/1 - OSINTdefender 推文

text: OSINTdefender U.S. President Donald J. Trump continues his complaining about NATO in a late night post on TruthSocial, stating: “NATO wasn’t there for us, and they won’t be there for us in the future! President DONALD J. TRUMP” https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2044261385282920941/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender：美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普继续在“真实社交”深夜发帖抱怨北约，称：“北约没有支持我们，未来也不会支持我们！唐纳德·J·特朗普总统” https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2044261385282920941/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel U.S. President Donald Trump to ABC News: "If I weren’t president, the world would be torn to pieces." U.S. President Donald Trump said that he isn't thinking about extending the ceasefire, adding that he doesn't think it will be necessary. "I think you’re going to be watching an amazing two days ahead. I really do," he told ABC News' Jonathan Karl. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044258194659197383/photo/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel：美国总统唐纳德·特朗普对美国广播公司新闻部说：“如果我不是总统，世界就会四分五裂。”美国总统唐纳德·特朗普表示，他没有考虑延长停火协议，并补充说他认为没有必要。“我认为你将看到未来两天会有惊人的事情发生。我真的这么认为，”他告诉美国广播公司新闻部的乔纳森·卡尔。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044258194659197383/photo/1 - Open Source Intel 推文

text: OSINTtechnical Trump complains about NATO in a late night post: “NATO wasn’t there for us” https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2044260823896346719/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical：特朗普在深夜发帖抱怨北约：“北约没有支持我们” https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2044260823896346719/photo/1 推文

text: The Spectator Index IMF projection for economic growth in 2026. 🇻🇳 Vietnam: 7.1% 🇮🇳 India: 6.5% 🇮🇩 Indonesia: 5.0% 🇲🇾 Malaysia: 4.7% 🇧🇩 Bangladesh: 4.7% 🇨🇳 China: 4.4% 🇵🇭 Philippines: 4.1% 🇵🇰 Pakistan: 3.6% 🇺🇸 United States: 2.3% 🇦🇺 Australia: 2.0% 🇰🇷 South Korea: 1.9% 🇹🇭 Thailand: 1.5% 🇨🇦 Canada: 1.5% 🇯🇵 Japan: 0.7% tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index：国际货币基金组织对2026年经济增长的预测。🇻🇳 越南：7.1% 🇮🇳 印度：6.5% 🇮🇩 印度尼西亚：5.0% 🇲🇾 马来西亚：4.7% 🇧🇩 孟加拉国：4.7% 🇨🇳 中国：4.4% 🇵🇭 菲律宾：4.1% 🇵🇰 巴基斯坦：3.6% 🇺🇸 美国：2.3% 🇦🇺 澳大利亚：2.0% 🇰🇷 韩国：1.9% 🇹🇭 泰国：1.5% 🇨🇦 加拿大：1.5% 🇯🇵 日本：0.7% 推文

text: OSINTdefender The U.S. Navy has intercepted a total of eight crude oil tankers attempting to enter or leave Iranian ports since the start of the blockade on Monday, in all cases, American forces contacted the crew by radio communications and instructed them to reverse course, with all of the tankers having complied thus no boarding was deemed necessary, U.S. officials tell the Wall Street Journal. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender：美国海军自周一封锁开始以来，已拦截了总共八艘试图进入或离开伊朗港口的油轮。在所有情况下，美军都通过无线电通讯联系了船员并指示他们掉头，所有油轮都遵守了指令，因此美方官员告诉《华尔街日报》，没有必要登船。推文

text: Open Source Intel U.S. President Donald Trump: "NATO wasn’t there for us, and they won’t be there for us in the future!" https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044260133409083404/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel：美国总统唐纳德·特朗普：“北约没有支持我们，未来也不会支持我们！” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044260133409083404/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel U.S. President Donald Trump: "Will someone please tell Pope Leo that Iran has killed at least 42,000 innocent, completely unarmed, protesters in the last two months, and that for Iran to have a Nuclear Bomb is absolutely unacceptable. Thank you for your attention to this matter. AMERICA IS BACK!!! President DONALD J. TRUMP." tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel：美国总统唐纳德·特朗普：“请谁去告诉教皇利奥，伊朗在过去两个月里杀害了至少42,000名无辜、完全手无寸铁的抗议者，而且伊朗拥有核弹是绝对不可接受的。感谢您对此事的关注。美国回来了！！！唐纳德·J·特朗普总统。” 推文

text: Open Source Intel U.S. President Donald Trump said that he isn't thinking about extending the ceasefire, adding that he doesn't think it will be necessary. "I think you’re going to be watching an amazing two days ahead. I really do," he told ABC News' Jonathan Karl. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044258194659197383/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel：美国总统唐纳德·特朗普表示，他没有考虑延长停火协议，并补充说他认为没有必要。“我认为你将看到未来两天会有惊人的事情发生。我真的这么认为，”他告诉美国广播公司新闻部的乔纳森·卡尔。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044258194659197383/photo/1 推文
